description_long: This object is a whole Hass avocado with a classic pear-like shape, featuring a slightly bumpy, textured skin. The skin is a deep green color with lighter green and yellowish speckles distributed across its surface. At the top, a small, circular stem scar is visible, indicating where the fruit was attached to the tree. The surface appears semi-matte with a natural, slightly waxy sheen, and there are a few minor blemishes and dark spots scattered around the skin. The avocado's form is plump and symmetrical, tapering gently toward the top. No cut surfaces or interior are visible, and the object is isolated against a plain white background.
description: A whole, deep green Hass avocado with a bumpy, speckled skin and a visible stem scar, isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broadest part of the avocado with a smooth, uninterrupted green surface and subtle speckling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gentle taper toward the top and a slightly lighter green area with fewer blemishes.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the stem scar at the top and more pronounced yellow-green speckles on the skin.
description_view_3: Rear view with the stem scar clearly visible and a denser pattern of speckles and minor dark spots.
attribute_skin_blemishes: minor dark spots and small scars
